data.content: Completed the child implementation work for active ancestor visibility: the Knots, Beads, and bd CLI backends now keep active beats' parent chains visible, and regression coverage now asserts that behavior for direct and auto-routed backends. Validation: bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build; bun run lint (warnings only). Branch: feat/foolery-e805-active-ancestor. Commit: 84e47100afc2.
